# CWE-349 vulnerable — Acceptance of Extraneous Untrusted Data With Trusted Data
lang: go
file: CWE-349-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type GormDB struct{}

func (db *GormDB) First(dest interface{}, conds ...interface{}) error { return nil }

type SignedBundle struct {
	TrustedAdmin bool            `json:"trusted_admin"`
	Profile      json.RawMessage `json:"profile"`
}

func PromoteFromBundle(c *GinCtx, db *GormDB) error {
	var bundle SignedBundle
	_ = json.NewDecoder(c.Request.Body).Decode(&bundle)
	var profile map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(bundle.Profile, &profile)
	if bundle.TrustedAdmin {
		return db.First(profile, "UPDATE users SET role = ? WHERE id = ?", profile["role"], profile["id"])
	}
	return nil
}
